claim_boundary: finite deterministic source-faithful DTQC visualization evidence; not a formal proof, thermodynamic-limit existence result, or empirical validation

mathematical_bindings.canonical_dubler_ratio: exp(-delta_S/K_D); retained separately and not substituted into legacy reference images
mathematical_bindings.dfi: sixty radial FFT profiles with the legacy DFI volume/entropy transform
mathematical_bindings.flowpoint: alternating sector applied to an intrinsically phase-evolving ten-wave field
mathematical_bindings.legacy_visual_elastic_pi: pi*mean_i(exp(S_i/K_D)); clipped exactly as the legacy visual generator
mathematical_bindings.scatter: 5-D integer cloud -> random 4-D projection -> phase-offset intrinsic 4-D oscillation -> OU-camera 3-D view
